title: BEM-840 read 839/time fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
# Use executor-provided now, not hardcoded chat time.
created=str(now)
b839=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
status_in=b839.get('status','missing_bem839_state')
missing=b839.get('missing',[])
if not missing and status_in!='triad_present':
    # defensive recompute if old state is incomplete
    missing=['unknown_from_bem839']
if status_in=='triad_present' or not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='continue_repair_dispatch_results'
    next_action='inspect dispatch result writer/processor placement; queue retry was not enough'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='continue_repair_claude_runtime_state'
    next_action='parse dispatch result then repair Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='continue_repair_real_claude_response'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/provider and retry real response'
else:
    status='continue_repair_unknown_missing'
    next_action='recompute triad proof and repair first missing proof'
# Add timestamp rule.
rule=Path('governance/protocols/BEM840_TIMESTAMP_RULE.md')
rule.write_text('# BEM-840 | Timestamp Rule\n\nTimestamp must be generated from repo-side executor `now` or runner clock. Do not hardcode chat-local timestamps in Codex task payloads. If clock proof is needed, write it into repo state from executor/runtime. Reports do not stop development.\n')
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'created_at':created,'bem839_status':status_in,'bem839_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'timestamp_rule':str(rule)}
Path('governance/state/bem840_read_839_fix_time_and_continue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_read_839_fix_time_and_continue.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Read BEM-839 Fix Time And Continue | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'BEM-839: '+status_in+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(rule),'governance/state/bem840_read_839_fix_time_and_continue.json','governance/reports/bem840_read_839_fix_time_and_continue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Read BEM-839 state, fixed timestamp rule to use executor now, and selected next repair without stopping')
"""
No issue comments.
